title: Project DIVINE
description:
Project DIVINE is a Modpack of all Mandatory & neat Hypixel Skyblock Mods for Minecraft Version [1.21.5].
DISCLAIMER: All mods & features in the Modpack are use at your own risk.
(Put together by xdonutzz & qpbabo)
body:
## **About the Modpack:**
**Project DIVINE** is a **Modpack of ALL Mandatory & neat Hypixel Skyblock Mods** for Minecraft Version [1.21.5], bringing **ALOT** of **QoL** Features/Funktions to your **Gameplay**, aswell as **A TON** of **Performance optimization** Mods, to further **ENHANCE** it, **HELPING YOU become an DIVINE Skyblock Gamer**.

By using **Project DIVINE**, you are essentialy **Upgrading** from your **current 1.8.9 Mods** for Hypixel Skyblock to the **NEWEST and BEST 1.21.5 Mods** possible. \
With our **Project DIVINE** you will be staying **UP to DATE** on any Updates for the Mods.


 

**DISCLAIMER**: All mods & features in the Modpack are use at your own risk. DO NOT download Mods from UNTRUSTED SOURCES, otherwise you risk getting your account stolen.

### **Coming Soon:**
We will be adding a nice **Texturepack "Collection"** soon ,aiming to make the **Foraging Update** look very **Magnificent**, aswell as bringing Hypixel Skyblock a new
**Definition**,untill The Developers release their own Offical Texturepack.


Will be adding an **DIVINE Config** for **Project DIVINE** , which should give a **GOOD** baseline where also **no  duplicate features** are enabled.

(Put together by xdonutzz & qpbabo)

# **Current Mods for Project DIVINE**:

**Mandatory Mods:**

-FabricAPI (this is required for most mods to work): https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api

-Sodium (This is the Optifine of modern Minecraft): https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium

-Architectury API: https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api

-Cloth Config API: https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config

-Collective: https://modrinth.com/mod/collective

-Fabric Language Kotlin: https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin

-YetAnotherConfigLibrary https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl


**Must Have Mods:**

-Skyblocker: https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblocker-liap

-Aaron's mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/aaron-mod

-Firmament: https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament

-Cookie's mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/cookies-mod

-Roughly Enough Items: https://modrinth.com/mod/rei

**Cool Mods to have:**

-Better F3: https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3

-Cubes Without Borders (Borderless Fullscreen): [https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-withou...](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders)

-Gamma Utils (Brightness Mod): https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils

-Mod Menu: https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu

-More Chat History: https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory

-More Culling (Performance mod): https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling

-Sodium Extra (More video settings options): https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra

-Zoomify (Optifine Zoom): https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify 

-Capes: https://modrinth.com/mod/capes
